sql.if: AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND s.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND s.area_id = #{areaId}) )

AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND t.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND t.area_id = #{areaId}) )

AND ( (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 9999) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 10000) != 0 AND MOD(#{areaId}, 100) = 0 AND r.area_id BETWEEN #{areaId} AND #{areaId} + 99) OR (MOD(#{areaId}, 100) != 0 AND r.area_id = #{areaId}) )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensor s WHERE s.status IN (1, 2)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection i INNER JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id WHERE i.data_status IN (2, 3) AND i.create_time >= CURDATE() AND i.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.status IN (0, 1)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE ( (t.status = 0 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, t.public_time, NOW()) > 24) OR (t.status = 1 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, t.response_time, NOW()) > 48) OR t.status = 3 )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.status = 2 AND t.accomplish_time >= CURDATE() AND t.accomplish_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task t WHERE t.status = 2
SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, t.response_time, t.accomplish_time)) FROM task t WHERE t.status = 2 AND t.response_time IS NOT NULL AND t.accomplish_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT i.id as id, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(i.create_time) * 1000 as time, s.id as sensorId, CONCAT('传感器-', s.id) as sensorName, s.area_id as areaId, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district) as areaName, CASE WHEN i.data_status = 2 THEN '危险状态检测到异常数据' WHEN i.data_status = 3 THEN '高危状态检测到严重异常数据' ELSE '检测到异常数据' END as message, CASE WHEN i.data_status = 2 THEN '危险' WHEN i.data_status = 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '异常' END as level FROM inspection i INNER JOIN sensor s ON i.sensor_id = s.id INNER JOIN area a ON s.area_id = a.id WHERE i.data_status IN (2, 3)
AND i.create_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime} / 1000)
AND i.create_time <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime} / 1000)
ORDER BY i.create_time DESC LIMIT 100
